case_title: HO HON CHOW VS. WINNIE GUO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, HO HON
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CHOW, HO HON AS TO DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE CHAUG, TERESA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CHOW, HO HON AS TO DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-03-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT AND SERVE ALL DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---WANSHUN HO. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---MARILYN LUONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED DEC-15-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUG, TERESA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, HO HON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUO, WINNIE CHAUG, TERESA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
